top_queue.title: Review prompt timing hack: +0.8 stars by delaying review request to value moment
Habit tracker apps are printing: HabitSwipe $800 revenue, 2.5K users in 2 months
Minimum Viable Day concept: 307 upvotes, viral productivity framework

NEW BLUE OCEAN: NoFap/sobriety streak tracker. r/NoFap = 1.24M subs, 0 paid dedicated streak apps. Quittr app had privacy scandal (exposed user data) = MASSIVE trust gap. Privacy-first paid app at $1.99-2.99 directly addresses this.

Adapty 2026: Weekly plans = 55% of all app revenue. Weekly+trial = best LTV config. 6x iOS conversion vs monthly-only. IMMEDIATE ACTION: Switch PrayerLock to weekly .99/wk + 3-day free trial as primary IAP.
Free trial paywall framework: 7-day trial = 5x conversion lift (2% to 11%). Hard paywall k

running_streak: r/running = 4.19M subs. iTunes scan confirms ZERO dedicated paid running-streak app. Only Streaks ($5.99 generic) appears. This is the largest unserved fitness niche found to date. Build dedicated RunningStreak at $1.99 launch.

Fitness streak app cluster: yoga (3.31M), hiit (4.72M), pushup (4.72M), plank (4.72M), cycling (1.45M). All 5 niches = 0 dedicated paid apps on iTunes. One template, 5 apps. Sequential builds at $1.99 each.
